summary: Hardened response cache permissions and made auth set-token persist to the BreezeDoc API token field.
reason: Cached API responses can contain sensitive document, invoice, and recipient data; saved tokens should also land in the same api_token config field advertised by the auth setup flow.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; go build ./... passed; auth set-token wrote api_token without persisting alternate bearer env vars; public-library package, skill, supply-chain, and govulncheck verifiers passed.
